title: Luffy Is Trapped Inside Nola
description: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this scene centers on Luffy, Nico Robin, Enel, Nami, Wyper. Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I never would have thought that

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Some poneglyphs were taken to this city!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: This city once had to fight...

summary: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
